originalCode:
# Augment Agent — Extended Configuration

Personal `~/.augment/` backup — 3 marketplace plugins + Karpathy Guidelines, Augment-adapted.

## What's in here

| Directory | What | In Git? |
|-----------|------|---------|
| `skills/superpowers/` | **Superpowers** — 14 workflow skills (primary framework) | [OK] |
| `skills/ecc/` | **Everything Claude Code** — 67 general-purpose skills (auto-loaded) | [OK] |
| `skills/ui-ux-pro-max/` | **UI/UX Pro Max** — searchable design database (67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings) | [OK] |
| `skills/caveman*/` | **Caveman** — token compression (caveman, commit, review, compress, help) | [OK] |
| `skills/karpathy-guidelines/` | **Karpathy Guidelines** — reduce common LLM coding mistakes (4 core principles) | [OK] |
| `skill-library/ecc/` | **Optional ECC skills** — 88 domain/language-specific skills (NOT auto-loaded) | [X] Gitignored |
| `agents/` | 38 sub-agents (reviewers, build resolvers, domain specialists) | [OK] |
| `rules/` | Global rules loaded into every session | [OK] |
| `settings.json` | Model, indexing, and MCP server config | [OK] |
| `plugins/marketplaces/` | Original plugin git repos (clone separately per INSTALL.md) | [X] Gitignored |
| `.codegraph/` | CodeGraph index (regenerate per machine) | [X] Gitignored |
| `ck/` | Context Keeper project registry + contexts | [X] Gitignored |
| `projects/` | Native memory directories | [X] Gitignored |
| `sessions/` | Session state files | [X] Gitignored |
| `checkpoint-documents/` | File edit checkpoints | [X] Gitignored |
| `task-storage/` | Task list persistence | [X] Gitignored |
| `untruncated/` | View-range cache | [X] Gitignored |

**Shared (git):**
- Skills, agents, rules
- settings.json (model + MCP, no auth)
- Docs

**Local only (regenerate):**
- Runtime (sessions, checkpoints, tasks)
- Indexes (codegraph, untruncated, skill-library)
- Machine paths (ck, native memory)
- Marketplace repos (clone separately)

## Adaptations from Claude Code

- `~/.claude/` → `~/.augment/`
- Hooks → rule automation (`session-lifecycle.md`)
- `continuous-learning` runs inline (no transcript dependency)
- Superpowers > ECC (`superpowers-priority.md`)

## Rules

| Rule | File | What |
|------|------|------|
| **0** | `session-lifecycle.md` | Transparency — `[●]` `[◆]` `[▲]` `[!]` banners |
| **1** | `session-lifecycle.md` | Session start — auto-resume or register |
| **2** | `session-lifecycle.md` | Auto-save — session end, git ops, milestones |
| **Priority** | `superpowers-priority.md` | Superpowers > ECC |
| **Caveman** | `caveman-activate.md` | Auto-terse — drop filler, `/caveman lite\|full\|ultra` |
| **Honest** | `honest-feedback.md` | Evidence-first — research before arguing |
| **Research** | `research-delegation.md` | Parallel sub-agent dispatch for research |

## Session lifecycle (automated)

```
Start → auto-resume or register
  ↓
Work → agent matches skills
  ↓
Git commit → auto-save checkpoint (/ck:save)
  ↓
"bye" → save + continuous-learning
"handoff" → save + portable markdown doc (/ck:handoff)
  ↓
Next session → briefing (where left off)
```

**Handoff mode:** `/ck:handoff [focus]` creates portable markdown in project root for agent transfer (Cursor/Claude Desktop/teammate). Auto-redacts secrets. Add `.gitignore`: `ck-handoff-*.md`

Zero manual commands for normal workflow.

## Skill Library (optional)

88 domain/language-specific ECC skills in `skill-library/ecc/` — not auto-loaded (context reduction).

**Use:** `cp -r ~/.augment/skill-library/ecc/<skill> <repo>/.augment/skills/`

**Categories:** Languages (Python, Go, Rust, C++, C#, Java, Kotlin, Perl) · Frameworks (Django, Laravel, Spring Boot, Flutter, SwiftUI, Compose, Next.js, Nuxt, Bun) · Domains (Healthcare, Supply Chain, ClickHouse) · Content (article, brand voice, X API) · Media (fal.ai, Remotion, Manim, VideoDB) · Business (investor materials, billing ops) · Integrations (Jira, Google Workspace, Nutrient) · Other (Claude API, OpenClaw, open-source pipeline)

## Docs

- `INSTALL.md` — setup guide (Tasks 1-11)
- `SKILLS-AND-AGENTS.md` — skill/agent catalog

## Restore

```bash
git clone https://github.com/phcngyn99/augment-extend.git ~/.augment
```

Update `settings.json` local paths if needed.

## MCP Servers

| Server | Purpose | API Key? |
|--------|---------|----------|
| **Context7** | Live library/framework docs | No (free) |
| **sequential-thinking** | Structured multi-step reasoning | No (free) |

Configured in `settings.json` under `mcpServers`. Add paid servers (Exa, Firecrawl, fal.ai) when API keys are available.
